auth.label: Platform API Token
auth.description: Turso Platform API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create one with `turso auth api-tokens mint <name>` as documented here: https://docs.turso.tech/cli/auth/api-tokens/mint.

actions.name: create_database
actions.description: Create a Turso database in one organization and group.

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug used in the Turso API path.

group.description: The Turso group where the database should be created.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Turso database.

slug.description: The resource slug when Turso returns one.

name.description: The resource name when Turso returns one.

type.description: The resource type when Turso returns one.

location.description: The location code when Turso returns one.

uuid.description: The UUID when Turso returns one.

group.description: The group name when Turso returns one.

hostname.description: The database hostname when Turso returns one.

code.description: The location code when Turso returns one.

raw.description: The raw Turso resource object returned by the Platform API.

database.description: A normalized Turso Platform API resource.

actions.name: create_group
actions.description: Create a Turso group in one organization with a primary location.

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug used in the Turso API path.

location.description: The primary Turso location code for the group.

anyOf.description: The explicit extension names to enable for new databases in the group.

extensions.description: The extensions to enable for new databases in the group.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for creating a Turso group.

slug.description: The resource slug when Turso returns one.

name.description: The resource name when Turso returns one.

type.description: The resource type when Turso returns one.

location.description: The location code when Turso returns one.

uuid.description: The UUID when Turso returns one.

group.description: The group name when Turso returns one.

hostname.description: The database hostname when Turso returns one.

code.description: The location code when Turso returns one.

raw.description: The raw Turso resource object returned by the Platform API.

group.description: A normalized Turso Platform API resource.

actions.name: delete_database
actions.description: Delete a Turso database from one organization.

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug used in the Turso API path.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Turso database.

deleted.description: Whether the connector finished the delete request successfully.

outputSchema.description: The normalized delete result returned by the connector.

database.description: A normalized Turso Platform API resource.

outputSchema.description: The Turso database returned by the Platform API.
